item.framing: Centered item icon, slightly angled for depth. Object fills 80% of frame. No hand holding it. No text.

monster.framing: Full body, centered, facing left toward player. Dynamic pose. No background elements.

character.framing: Upper body portrait, 3/4 view facing right. Heroic pose. Character fills 70-80% of the frame. Expressive face visible.

fullbody.framing: Full body head-to-toe character, facing slightly right, centered, feet near bottom. No ground plane text. Character fills most of the frame height.

location.framing: Atmospheric establishing shot of a fantasy location. No UI chrome, no text, no watermarks. Dark fantasy mood.

combat_bg.framing: Side-view RPG battle arena. Solid continuous ground plane fills lower 35-45% so fighters stand on dirt/stone. Horizon near mid-frame. Open left/right standing zones. Environment frames edges only. No characters, creatures, weapons, UI, or text. Exciting atmosphere but grounded — not aerial/void underfoot.

map.framing: Parchment fantasy world map, top-down, aged paper texture, hand-drawn ink style. Dark fantasy. No modern UI, no watermarks, no package credits.

ui.framing: Flat UI element design. Clean edges suitable for 9-slice or tiling. Dark fantasy bronze and gold tones.

splash.framing: Dramatic establishing or title composition. Atmospheric dark fantasy. No UI text or watermarks.
